reviews.comment:
Hay q arreglar los sanitarios! Finde con muchos turistas y un solo sanitario!

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms need fixing! A weekend with lots of tourists and only one restroom!

reviews.comment:
Deja bastante que desear para ser del Aca. El baño funcionaba uno solo, estaba limpio pero le falta mantenimiento. El shop tenia cosas básicas, el cafe es de maquina instantánea que se lo tiene que preparar uno mismo, no tiene lugar para comer afuera. El playero muy amable. Por ser la única estación del pueblo le falta actualizarse.

(Translated by Google)
It leaves much to be desired for an ACA station. Only one bathroom was working; it was clean but needed maintenance. The shop had basic items, the coffee is from an instant machine that you have to make yourself, and there's no place to eat outside. The attendant was very friendly. Being the only station in town, it needs updating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdi1TbTJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atencion de empleados y dueño. Mostraron una foto de un baño sucio que era falsa para impedir el acceso al baño a los clientes. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the employees and owner. They showed a fake picture of a dirty bathroom to prevent customers from using it. Shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtb2NiS2t3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Única estación en 100 km . Por eso se avivan del costo de la NAFTA  cara. Además pedís de pasar al baño y dicen que están rotos y te mandan a los baños públicos, los de ellos no los dejan abiertos al cliente ...mala atención en el shop un desastre en general. Deberían dejar instalar otra estación para que sean más humanos en todo aspecto...empleada y encargado y/o dueño.

(Translated by Google)
Only gas station for 100 km. That's why they're so quick to charge high prices for gasoline. Plus, if you ask to use the restroom, they say it's broken and send you to the public restrooms; they don't even leave their own open to customers... terrible service in the shop, a complete disaster. They should allow another station to open so they can be more humane in every way... employees, manager, and/or owner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX3Y2VGFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención y trato de parte de la empleada y el dueño, te obligan a consumir o te piden ser socios ACA para poder pasar al baño. Ademas te mienten en la cara diciendo que los baños estan sucios cuando en verdad es para que te vayas a otro lado literalmente.

(Translated by Google)
The service and treatment from the employee and owner were terrible. They pressure you to buy something or demand you be an ACA member just to use the restroom. They also lie to your face, saying the restrooms are dirty when they're really trying to get you to go somewhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX3FHZUhREAE
